title: rubus coccinatus
intro: Rubus coccinatus, also known as the desert dewberry, is a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat gastrointestinal issues and its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus coccinatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant. Rubus coccinatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
